description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The exterior is predominantly white with large, black-framed windows arranged in vertical strips, allowing ample natural light inside. The front features a black awning above the main entryway, which is accented by a modern door and a small porch area with outdoor furniture and shelving. On one side, there is a fenced patio or yard area, partially visible with some outdoor furnishings. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces, typical of contemporary urban homes.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, white facade, large black-framed windows, and a fenced patio area. The front features a black awning, modern door, and a small porch with outdoor furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a black awning, modern door, porch furniture, and large vertical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced patio area, a large window, and visible interior decor through the upper windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a simple white facade, showing the back of the fenced patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with several windows and a clear view of the flat roof and side wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Modern door with black awning, small porch, outdoor furniture, and shelving
